content:
🌟 free-llm-api-resources | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To discover and utilize free API endpoints for various Large Language Models, enabling developers to experiment with and integrate LLM functionalities without incurring costs.
✨ Key Features: • Lists free LLM inference resources accessible via API • Categorizes providers into 'Free Providers' and 'Providers with trial credits' • Details limits and available models for each provider
📖 Summary: This repository serves as a curated list of free API resources for accessing various Large Language Models (LLMs). It aims to provide developers with readily available, cost-free options for integrating LLM capabilities into their applications, including models from major providers and open-source alternatives.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
